_comment: CEO Orchestration — Node.js/TypeScript STACK hooks. Installed when install.sh is run with --stack node. Merged into settings.json alongside settings.base.json. Assumes: package.json with scripts, tsc available via npx, vitest available via npx.

PreToolUse._comment: Pre-commit gate: tsc --noEmit + vitest run must pass before ANY git commit. Stack-specific (TypeScript + vitest).

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q '^git commit' && { cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5; TSC_EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; if [ $TSC_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"tsc --noEmit failed. Fix TypeScript errors before committing."}'; exit 0; fi; npx vitest run 2>&1 | tail -20; VITEST_EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; if [ $VITEST_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"vitest run failed. Fix failing tests before committing."}'; exit 0; fi; echo '{"decision":"allow","reason":"tsc + vitest passed"}'; } || true
